response.overview: Sexy Showgirls & Dirty Dancers. They're the sexy showstoppers who've got it - and flaunt it - in revealing revues across the nation. From cabaret dancers to chorus girls, striptease artists to glitzy entertainers, these uninhibited women sear the stage with sultry sex appeal and daring acrobatic moves. It's showtime as Playboy unveils a sizzling expose into the real world of showgirls as you've never seen them before. Exploding with raw energy and eroticism, these statuesque beauties strut their stuff, tease and tantalize, and flash more than a little skin in workouts that will leave you breathless. This Playboy exclusive features electrifying performances, undress rehearsals, risque romps, seductive lap dancing and more. Plus, intimate interviews and exciting behind-the-scenes action from the showoffs that show it all with such style. On and off stage, these provocative performers will whet your appetite for one encore after another. Now, that's entertainment.
response.title: Playboy Strip
